concerns.text: FR-003 specifies reconstruction of p‑values using SciPy, and SC-003 requires all statistical tests be computed with SciPy. The validation set’s ground‑truth p‑values are also generated with SciPy (see Idea Md, step 7). This makes the validation of the reconstruction logic dependent on the same library implementation, reducing independence and risking circular validation if a systematic implementation error exists.
